since_last: 47% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.69%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 47% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC -3.19% · Gold -2.75% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 47% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.69%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.69%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.68%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +13.25%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +13.25%, QCOM +8.75%, AMAT +6.50%, LRCX +6.37%, ZBRA +5.17%. Laggards: MDB -6.22%, BBAI -5.57%, SMR -4.14%, ORCL -3.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.17% at $154.28
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
